channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Sharks on verge of trading top-pair defenseman to Oilers, per report
item.description: NHL trade deadline: San Jose Sharks reportedly close to dealing top scoring defenseman Jake Walman to Edmonton Oilers
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: One-of-a-kind card featuring jersey patch of Pirates star Paul Skenes is heading to auction
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Paul Skenes has been in the major leagues for less than a year. A piece of the Pittsburgh Pirates ace — well, OK, a piece of the jersey that Skenes donned during his first start last May — could be ready to join some elite company.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jaguars release Pro Bowl tight end Evan Engram; cap cuts continue: reports
item.description: Evan Engram was the Jacksonville Jaguars' latest cap casualty Thursday. He was released after the trade of Christian Kirk to the Houston Texans.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: San Francisco State University cutting men's soccer and 2 other sports
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- San Francisco State University announced plans on Thursday to cut three sports programs as part of its budget planning. The announced cuts follow a budget meeting last week that was "particularly difficult," according to an open letter posted by SFSU President Lynn Mahoney.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Devils get Dumoulin, Panthers add Sturm and Golden Knights reacquire Smith as NHL trades pile up
item.description: The banged-up New Jersey Devils wasted no time filling an area of need ahead of the NHL trade deadline, the defending champion Florida Panthers made an under-the-radar move that could pave the way for another deep playoff run, and the Vegas Golden Knights brought back a member of their recent Stanle
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wyndham Clark handles a stressful test at Bay Hill to lead by 2
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Wyndham Clark handled a stressful day at Bay Hill by eliminating as much trouble as possible. Two late birdies as the wind finally waned carried him to a 5-under 67 and a two-shot lead Thursday in the Arnold Palmer Invitational.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Man United draws 1-1 at Real Sociedad in Europa League and Tottenham loses to AZ Alkmaar
item.description: Manchester United settled for a 1-1 draw with Real Sociedad in the first leg of the Europa League round of 16 on Thursday. United led on Joshua Zirkzee's goal in the 58th minute but the hosts equalized 12 minutes later after Bruno Fernandes' hand ball.
item.dc:creator: KAREL JANICEK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Newsom faces fiery backlash after talking 'issue of fairness' with transgender inclusion in women's sports
item.description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom faced backlash from Democrats and Republicans over his comments about transgender athletes in women's sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Michael Jordan co-owned 23XI Racing faces NASCAR countersuit amid charter fallout
item.description: The latest legal action follows last October's lawsuit from 23XI Racing and Front Row Motorsports, which described NASCAR as "monopolistic bullies.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: White Sox reassign top 2 prospects to minor-league camp, team announces Thursday
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. — The White Sox reassigned two of their top prospects to minor-league camp, one a west suburban native, the team announced Thursday morning prior to its spring training game against the San Francisco Giants.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Bill Belichick's girlfriend, Jordon Hudson, praises Trump in social media post
item.description: Jordon Hudson, Bill Belichick's girlfriend, took to social media to celebrate the "wonderful news" that the Maine Sea Grant was being reinstated, saying that "Trump Loves Fisherman.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Women's tennis players now are eligible for paid maternity leave financed by Saudi fund
item.description: Pregnant players on the women’s tennis tour now can receive 12 months of paid maternity leave, and those who become parents via partner pregnancy, surrogacy or adoption can get two months off with pay.
item.dc:creator: Howard Fendrich, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Chargers release linebacker Joey Bosa after 9 seasons with the franchise
item.description: The Los Angeles Chargers released Joey Bosa on Wednesday night, ending the linebacker's nine-season tenure with the franchise. The move, which came less than a week before the start of the new league year, was expected due to Bosa's large salary cap number and injury history.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cavaliers hold off Heat 112-107 to extend winning streak to 12 and clinch playoff spot
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Donovan Mitchell scored 26 points, Darius Garland had 10 assists and the Cleveland Cavaliers survived some sloppiness in the final two minutes to win their 12th straight game, 112-107 over the banged-up Miami Heat on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CMU Swimming is ready to chase their first National Championship
item.description: If there was ever a year for Colorado Mesa Swimming and Diving to bring home the program's first-ever national championship, this is the year.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Boys Basketball: Carlsbad 59, Fairmont Prep 55
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- 2025 CIF State Boys Basketball Championships Division I Carlsbad defeated Fairmont Prep 59-55. The visitors made the trek from Anaheim, and they could not slow down UCSD commit Jake Hall who hit for a game high 32 points for the Lancers.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Lightning acquire Gourde,Bjorkstrand as NHL trade action heats up
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning have answered the cross-state-rival and defending Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers' first couple of additions ahead of the NHL trade deadline with a big move of their own.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Whyno, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Men charged in deaths of 3 Chiefs fans found dead in backyard
item.description: Ricky Johnson, 38; Clayton McGeeney, 36; and David Harrington, 37, were all found dead in their friend’s Kansas City backyard on January 9, 2024.
item.dc:creator: Sean Noone, NewsNation

item.title: BYU wins double-overtime thriller over #10 Iowa State
item.description: AMES, Iowa (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored 23 points and No. 23 BYU outlasted No. 10 Iowa State 88-85 in double overtime Tuesday night for its seventh consecutive victory.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Flo Rida set to perform postgame concert at Rate Field this summer
item.description: Flo Rida will perform at a postgame concert at Rate Field following the White Sox game versus the San Francisco Giants on Friday, June 27 at 6:40 p.m. CT, with on-field Postgame Concert passes available to single-game ticket purchasers and White Sox season ticket holders.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers donate $20K in equipment to 3 Santa Clara high schools
item.description: (KRON) -- Students and athletes at three Santa Clara high schools will be stepping up their game after the San Francisco 49ers recently donated more than $20,000 worth of workout and football training equipment.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Filipowski scores 25, but Jazz lose to Detroit, 134-106
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Cade Cunningham had 29 points, nine assists and four steals, and the Detroit Pistons beat the Utah Jazz 134-106 on Monday night for their 10th win in 11 games. The Jazz committed 27 turnovers end a season-long nine-gam homestand with a record of 3-6.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 1A, 2A, 3A, 4A basketball brackets are out, as 5A & 6A Sweet 16s are set
item.description: Postseason basketball has officially ramped up and is in full swing. Here is where every local team stands.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Connor Zilisch's 'not smart' moves lead him to victory at Focused Health 250 in Austin
item.description: Zilisch shrugged off early and late trouble to capture the checkered flag in the NASCAR Xfinity Series Focused Health 250 on Saturday at Circuit of the Americas. It's his second career win on NASCAR's second circuit.
item.dc:creator: Grace Reader, Fox 5
